title: [AI5] Analyze Relationship Dynamics from Personality Test Results
summary: Added a deterministic relationship dynamics analyzer for two personality-result JSON files. It preserves the exact requested prompt, fuzzy-normalizes trait keys, validates two result payloads, compares Big Five scores, and emits strengths/watchpoints without sending private data to a live model during verification.

verification.notes: Self-test confirmed exact prompt retention and high-contrast extraversion detection.
